public_basis: Shift-B abnormal results require cause-sensitive containment rather than blame assignment.

sources.record: Samples: Shift A 1 abnormal / 100; Shift B 10 / 100.
The complete cleaning protocol was logged before Shift B.
Sealed controls: Shift A 1 abnormal / 100; Shift B 10 / 100. Sealed controls do not contact the cleaned sample surfaces.
